en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains valid Costa Rican Worker's Compensation documentation in the Costa Rica Workers' Compensation SRT Applicability Assessment questionnaire.
Costa Rica Workers' Compensation SRT Certificate
Please upload your company’s valid Workers' Compensation insurance policy issued by INS to confirm compliance with Costa Rica's Worker's Compensation requirements.
Most workers' compensation insurance policies are valid for one year depending on your company's policy designation and validity.
Please provide the expiration date of your Workers' Compensation insurance policy issued by INS.
